chapter_title.en: The Prayer of the Two Eids

text: 1470 - وَ رَوَى حَرِيزٌ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «لاَ تَقْضِ وَتْرَ لَيْلَتِكَ يَعْنِي فِي اَلْعِيدَيْنِ إِنْ كَانَ فَاتَكَ حَتَّى تُصَلِّيَ اَلزَّوَالَ فِي ذَلِكَ اَلْيَوْمِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1470 - Hariz narrated from Zurarah from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"Do not make up the Witr prayer of your night, meaning on the two Eids, if you missed it until you have prayed the midday (Dhuhr) prayer on that day."
